arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘approach’ hints at summer transfer as clear January stance emerges
arts.sum: Speaking in his pre-match press conference ahead of the Carabao Cup clash against Newcastle, he said: “We had a clear intention which is always there is a window open to explore the opportunities to improve our squad with players that can impact it. The Gunners didn’t add any new signings to their squad, despite their need for attacking reinforcements.

arts.ttl: 'That's what we're going to need': Eddie Howe shares the 'really potent' weapon he plans to use v Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Newcastle United will hope to reach a second League Cup final in three seasons when they take on Arsenal in Wednesday night’s semi-final second leg...

arts.ttl: Last 20 minutes of Arsenal loss regrettable - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says he regrets his side's last 20 minutes during their 5-1 defeat to Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Agreement reached: Arsenal star to sign contract with new club in coming days after snubbing 3 other offers
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho is expected to sign a contract with Flamengo in the coming days as he prepares to join the Brazilian club on a free transfer in the summer. The 33-year-old remains a key member of Mikel Arteta’s squad this season, and CaughtOffside understands that the Gunners were not keen on losing the player […] The post Agreement reached: Arsenal star to sign contract with new club in coming days after snubbing 3 other offers appeared first on CaughtOffside.

It’s do or die in terms of our Carabao Cup hopes on Wednesday night (8pm) as we head to Newcastle United looking to overturn a 2-0 first-leg deficit to reach our first final in the competition since 2018. In a game packed with goalscoring opportunities, Gabriel Martinelli thumped the post after being played through by Leandro Trossard with the scores at 0-0, but on 37 minutes Martin Dubravka lobbed a long free-kick into a crowd of players and Jacob Murphy inadvertently nudged it into the path of Isak who dispatched a clinical finish past David Raya via the crossbar.

arts.ttl: Nwaneri and Lewis-Skelly swapped, Calafiori decision - Arsenal line-ups vs Newcastle - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Newcastle: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Havertz, Trossard Doyle’s Arsenal XI vs Newcastle: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Trossard, Havertz

arts.ttl: I think panic could set in at Newcastle - but Arsenal will fear one thing too
arts.sum: Should they get off to a bad start in front of a nervous home crowd, Waddle worries that there could be some panic inside the stadium - but believes an 'electric' St James' Park atmosphere could put Arsenal under real pressure like it has in games between the two teams before. However, Newcastle's recent dip in form - two defeats at home against Bournemouth and Fulham - plus a difficult transfer window that saw Miguel Almiron and Lloyd Kelly depart and no one come in, has left a cloud hanging over the club going into such a crunch match.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer column: Truth about Watkins and Tel deals, plus big summer targets
arts.sum: How close Arsenal really came to signing Ollie Watkins and Mathys Tel In the end it was a frustrating transfer window for Arsenal fans, who were desperate for the club to bring in at least one new attacker. arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Arsenal: TV, live stream and kick-off info for Carabao Cup semi
arts.sum: Newcastle United are preparing to host Arsenal in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final as both Premier League clubs aim to reach the final at Wembley Stadium

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta slammed for deadline day actions as boss backs striker stance
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is coming under fire following Arsenal's quiet January transfer window, with concerns that the Gunners lack firepower for the Premier League title race
